enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable the OpenClaw Task System plugin.

pythonBin.label: Python Binary
pythonBin.help: Python executable used to invoke the task system runtime hooks.

runtimeRoot.label: Runtime Root
runtimeRoot.help: Absolute path to the openclaw-task-system project root.

configPath.label: Config Path
configPath.help: Optional path to task_system.json used by the runtime hooks.

debugLogPath.label: Debug Log Path
debugLogPath.help: Optional file path for plugin hook trace logs during integration debugging.

syncProgressOnMessageSending.label: Sync Progress On Send
syncProgressOnMessageSending.help: Touch active task progress whenever OpenClaw is about to send a visible message.

finalizeOnAgentEnd.label: Finalize On Agent End
finalizeOnAgentEnd.help: Automatically complete or fail the active task when the agent run ends.

minProgressMessageLength.label: Min Progress Length
minProgressMessageLength.help: Minimum outbound message length before it is treated as a visible progress update.

ignoreProgressPatterns.label: Ignore Progress Patterns
ignoreProgressPatterns.help: Regex patterns for outbound messages that should not count as progress.

enableHostFeishuDelivery.label: Enable Feishu Host Delivery
enableHostFeishuDelivery.help: Process Feishu send-instructions inside the plugin with OpenClaw host runtime instead of CLI message send.

hostDeliveryPollMs.label: Host Delivery Poll MS
hostDeliveryPollMs.help: Polling interval for the plugin-side Feishu delivery bridge.
